address.address1: Jl. Teuku Nyak Arief No.6, Darussalam, Kec. Syiah Kuala, Kota Banda Aceh, Aceh

nearbyPlaces.name: Area Parkir fakultas Ekonomi Universitas Syiah Kuala

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Kebaikkan
Dekat dgn kedai makan
Selesa

Perlu diperbaiki
-Tuala perlu tukar yg da koyak dan lusuh
-Bersihkan sampah di bawah katil
- setiap bilik adakan ketle utk masak air panas.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
It's location is strategic, the breakfast was sufficient. The bathroom mat should be something new, a more absorbing one. 
Please provide creamer

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 位置可以，周围很多美食，房间整洁，空调很不错

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Ke depannya diperbaiki lagi ya fasilitasnya, masak sabun ngak ada dan ditanya jawabannya nunggu pengiriman

Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Ruangan nya tidak seperti yang ada di deskripsi, hotel bersih dekat dg kampus UIN dan banyak yang jualan didepannya, haneuteun ceuk org sunda mah, pelayanan baik, kamar cocok kl sendiri, kl berdua pasti bersenggolan, karena ruangan terbatas, ada breakfast nya,👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Hi all,

not recommended and not worth the money.  room was smokey smell, even after clean (staff said) still smoke smell. also this hotel and breakfast is very normal.
